_comment: Per-layer LoRA rank config for Track 2 enhanced (Enhancement B-4).
Replaces uniform --peft.r=32 with face-binding-aware capacity allocation.
- BlindVLA Table 12: optimal face-discrim supervision at ~57% LM depth.
- Voita et al. 2019: ~5-8 of 48 transformer heads carry most function;
- Roham TRACK_B_WARMSTART.md: lm_head LoRA explicitly rejected (cost).
Total trainable params ~= uniform r=32, redistributed by relevance.
Loader is expected to map layer_index -> r for the language_model.layers[i].
If the lerobot+PEFT version does not support per-layer rank, fall back to
uniform r=32 by passing --peft.r=32 instead of --peft.layer_rank_config=.

rank_zones.15-17: top-LM name-token alignment, LM head reads from these (r=48 = 1.5x default)

fallback.if_lora_target_invalid: abort training, do not silently downgrade
